description: Patch: migrate the Trellis workflow runtime from a monolithic workflow.md file to workflow.yaml plus workflow/ body files.
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(workflow): `.trellis/workflow.yaml` is now the runtime workflow manifest, with long prompt bodies stored under `.trellis/workflow/`. `get_context.py`, SessionStart hooks, workflow-state breadcrumbs, OpenCode, and Pi read the structured manifest instead of parsing a monolithic `.trellis/workflow.md`.
- feat(update): `trellis init` and `trellis update` now write and hash-track `.trellis/workflow.yaml` plus every `.trellis/workflow/**` body file.

**Migration:**
- chore(update): pristine legacy `.trellis/workflow.md` files are removed through hash-verified safe-file-delete. Locally modified copies are preserved for manual reference, but runtime no longer reads them.

migrations.description: legacy monolithic workflow guide replaced by workflow.yaml + workflow/
migrations.reason: The workflow runtime now reads .trellis/workflow.yaml and .trellis/workflow/**. Pristine old workflow.md files can be removed; customized copies are preserved for manual migration.

notes: Run `trellis update` to install `.trellis/workflow.yaml` and `.trellis/workflow/**`. If you had customized `.trellis/workflow.md`, manually port those changes into the manifest/body files.
